Description.SourceString: A thick and juicy steak, combined with a rich and sticky dwellberry sauce. Each mouthful is like a taste explosion, and it can be difficult to hold yourself back. Orik the Bear was a Wild Knight who excelled in this dish, and other Wild Knights would seek him out at the gatherings for his culinary expertise.
